description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a .pre stage and a test stage using the rust:1.80 Docker image (prepare:lockfile uses rust:1). Define a prepare:lockfile job in .pre that runs CARGO_RESOLVER_INCOMPATIBLE_RUST_VERSIONS=fallback cargo generate-lockfile and publishes Cargo.lock as an artifact. In the test stage add a build:wasm32-unknown-unknown job that runs rustc -Vv && cargo -Vv, adds the wasm32-unknown-unknown target, then executes cargo test --no-run --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --all --features serde-serialize. Add a check:x86_64-apple-darwin job that installs the x86_64-apple-darwin target and runs cargo check --target=x86_64-apple-darwin --verbose --all --features serde-serialize. Add a test:i686-unknown-linux-gnu job that installs i386 architecture packages, adds the i686-unknown-linux-gnu target, sets PKG_CONFIG_ALLOW_CROSS=1, and runs cargo test --verbose --target=i686-unknown-linux-gnu --lib --features serde-serialize. Finally, add a test:x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu job that installs libudev-dev and other X11/SSL dependencies, adds the default target, and runs cargo test --verbose --all --features serde-serialize. Set global variables CARGO_HOME to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/cargo and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to normal.
